segments.text: To you, O LORD, I lift up my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O my God, in you I trust; let me not be put to shame; let not my enemies exult over me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Indeed, none who wait for you shall be put to shame; they shall be ashamed who are wantonly treacherous.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Make me to know your ways, O LORD; teach me your paths.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lead me in your truth and teach me, for you are the God of my salvation; for you I wait all the day long.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember your mercy, O LORD, and your steadfast love, for they have been from of old.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember not the sins of my youth or my transgressions; according to your steadfast love remember me, for the sake of your goodness, O LORD.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Good and upright is the LORD;
therefore he instructs sinners in the way.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He leads the humble in what is right, and teaches the humble his way.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the paths of the LORD are steadfast love and faithfulness,
for those who keep his covenant and his testimonies.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For your name's sake, O LORD, pardon my guilt, for it is great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who is the man who fears the LORD? Him will he instruct in the way that he should choose.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His soul shall abide in well-being, and his offspring shall inherit the land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The friendship of the LORD is for those who fear him, and he makes known to them his covenant.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: and…: or, and his covenant to make them know it

segments.text: My eyes are ever toward the LORD, for he will pluck my feet out of the net.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Turn to me and be gracious to me, for I am lonely and afflicted.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; bring me out of my distresses.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Consider my affliction and my trouble, and forgive all my sins.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Consider how many are my foes, and with what violent hatred they hate me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, guard my soul, and deliver me! Let me not be put to shame, for I take refuge in you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May integrity and uprightness preserve me, for I wait for you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.
segments.speaker: David
